note: Egress proxy blocks Alpaca/Finnhub APIs. Data sourced from web search of financial sites.

vix.note: VIX opened at 26.78 (spike on overnight concerns) then faded to 24.48 on ceasefire hopes

fear_greed.note: Down from 44 a month ago. 6 of 7 sub-indicators in extreme fear. Strong contrarian bullish signal building.

oil.note: Oil falling on reports of 45-day ceasefire discussions between US and Iran

geopolitical.headline: US-Iran ceasefire under active discussion
geopolitical.detail: 45-day ceasefire being negotiated. Trump gives Iran until Tuesday to open Strait of Hormuz. Markets cautiously optimistic.
geopolitical.impact: Risk-on if ceasefire materializes, risk-off if talks collapse

macro.note: First market session to react to weak Friday NFP. Stagflation concerns vs rate cut hopes.

gex_estimated.note: Estimated from April 3 report. SPY currently near gamma flip zone. Dealers transitioning from negative to positive gamma.
